headline: Mature, low-growth (~1-3%), hyper-competitive U.S. apparel retail in a late-cycle, K-shaped, value-seeking 2026; tariffs (~89% imported, effective rates up to 30-49%) are the dominant input-cost shock and the circular shift (resale ~13% growth, rental ~10% CAGR) both threatens full-price retail and underwrites Nuuly.
